# ciphertrust_aws_custom_keystore_list (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve a list of CipherTrust Manager AWS custom key stores.

Give a filter of 'limit=-1' to list all custom key stores that match the filter. Default is 10 matches.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all custom key stores (up to default limit of 10)
data "ciphertrust_aws_custom_keystore_list" "all" {}

# List custom key stores filtered by name
data "ciphertrust_aws_custom_keystore_list" "by_name" {
  filters = {
    name = "my-keystore"
  }
}

# List all custom key stores (no limit)
data "ciphertrust_aws_custom_keystore_list" "all_no_limit" {
  filters = {
    limit = "-1"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filters` (Map of String) A list of key:value pairs where the 'key' is any of the filters available in CipherTrust Manager's API playground for listing custom key stores.

### Read-Only

- `custom_key_stores` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--custom_key_stores))
- `matched` (Number) The number of custom key stores which matched the filters.

<a id="nestedatt--custom_key_stores"></a>
### Nested Schema for `custom_key_stores`

Read-Only:

- `aws_param` (Attributes) AWS-side parameters for the custom key store. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--custom_key_stores--aws_param))
- `cloud_name` (String) Name of the cloud provider.
- `created_at` (String) Date and time the custom key store was created.
- `credential_version` (Number) Version number of the current credentials.
- `enable_success_audit_event` (Boolean) Whether audit recording of successful operations within an external key store is enabled.
- `gone` (Boolean) True if the custom key store no longer exists in AWS.
- `id` (String) CipherTrust Manager ID of the custom key store.
- `kms` (String) Name of the AWS KMS account container associated with this key store.
- `kms_id` (String) CipherTrust Manager ID of the KMS account container.
- `local_hosted_params` (Attributes) Parameters related to local hosting of the custom key store. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--custom_key_stores--local_hosted_params))
- `name` (String) Unique name for the custom key store.
- `region` (String) Name of the available AWS region.
- `type` (String) Type of the custom key store.
- `updated_at` (String) Date and time the custom key store was last updated.
- `version_count` (Number) Number of credential versions available.

<a id="nestedatt--custom_key_stores--aws_param"></a>
### Nested Schema for `custom_key_stores.aws_param`

Read-Only:

- `arn` (String) Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the custom key store.
- `aws_account_id` (String) AWS account ID that owns this key store.
- `cloud_hsm_cluster_id` (String) ID of the CloudHSM cluster backing this key store.
- `connection_error_details` (String) Details about the last connection error, if any.
- `connection_state` (String) Current connection state of the custom key store in AWS.
- `custom_key_store_id` (String) AWS-assigned ID for the custom key store.
- `custom_key_store_name` (String) Name of the custom key store in AWS KMS.
- `custom_key_store_type` (String) Type of the custom key store (AWS_CLOUDHSM or EXTERNAL_KEY_STORE).
- `number_of_hsms_in_cloudhsm_cluster` (Number) Number of HSMs in the CloudHSM cluster.
- `trust_anchor_certificate` (String) CA certificate for the CloudHSM cluster.
- `xks_proxy_connectivity` (String) Connectivity type for the XKS proxy.
- `xks_proxy_uri_endpoint` (String) HTTPS endpoint of the XKS proxy.
- `xks_proxy_uri_path` (String) URI path used by the XKS proxy.
- `xks_proxy_vpc_endpoint_service_name` (String) VPC endpoint service name for the XKS proxy.


<a id="nestedatt--custom_key_stores--local_hosted_params"></a>
### Nested Schema for `custom_key_stores.local_hosted_params`

Read-Only:

- `blocked` (Boolean) Whether the custom key store is in a blocked state.
- `health_check_ciphertext` (String) Ciphertext used for health check operations.
- `health_check_key_id` (String) ID of the key used for health checks.
- `health_check_uri_path` (String) URI path used by AWS KMS to perform health checks.
- `linked_state` (Boolean) Whether the custom key store is linked with AWS.
- `max_credentials` (Number) Maximum number of credentials allowed for the key store.
- `partition_id` (String) ID of the Luna HSM partition.
- `partition_label` (String) Label of the Luna HSM partition.
- `source_container_id` (String) ID of the source container used for key material.
- `source_container_type` (String) Type of the source container.
- `source_key_tier` (String) Key tier used as the source for cryptographic keys.
